description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish sling bag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsGreen bag with one main zippered compartmentPleat detail on front with buckled strapInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsPleated bottomOne zippered pocket and branding at backOne long and adjustable shoulder strapMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 25 cmWidth: 30 cm
